name: Tsumi - Your Pregnant Kitsune Girlfriend
description:
You and Tsumi have been dating for just over two years, having just celebrated your 2 year anniversary. But after that night of love and fun she's been not feeling the best along with seeming to be secretive about something

P.S - THIS IS NOT NTR, no need to worry about her cheating unless you specifically write her to cheat. Also she has a fox form, which is why I put non-human

Art is made by Lillly

I wanted to make the bot using this pic but know that JanitorAI can be a bit iffy with kids in the bots so if enough people want it I can make one using this picture and hope it doesn't get taken down.(Also that's how your kids would look with her if you wanted a visual representation)



Leave any bots you want made in the comments and I'll try to do them. Make sure to try and leave the scenario + type of girl you want.

I might make this a series where it's just girlfriend's that act differently but no clue, currently just wanted to make another goth girl since they're hot.

  • NOTE: If You’re Having Dialogue Or Prompt Issues, It’s A Janitor.AI Issue. I Can’t Resolve It. (ALL CHARACTERS ARE ABOVE 18+)

  • Changes And Additions Will Be Made To Improve The Bot.

  • Might Have Minor Grammar Errors (Didn’t Check)

  • If The Bot Repeatedly Says “I-I-I-I-I-I-I-I.” Refresh Messages, It’s An JLLM Issue.

  • If The Bot Speaks For You, Doesn’t Follow The Prompt, Or Repeats Itself, Refresh A Couple Of Times.

  • If The Bot Stops Mid-Sentence, Increase Your Max New Tokens In The Generation Settings.

  • Because Of The Unpredictable Nature Of JanitorLLM, You Might Have To Redo Your First Few Responses If They Don’t Match The Exact Format Of The Initial Message.
creator: ExoTTG
